seoDescription: Explore featured projects and case studies by Aivora.
keywords: Aivora portfolio, AI projects, custom software portfolio, SaaS portfolio
headline: OUR WORK
supportingText: Take a look at some of our recent digital products we design and develop for startups and businesses.

projects.title: Aivora OS AI Terminal & Workspace
projects.description: We developed a real-time developer workspace with active AI agent simulations (Qualification Agent, Support Agent, and Director) and live telemetry logs. The assistant utilizes natural language understanding to qualify leads and manage operations.
projects.outcome: Reduced manual lead triage to zero and automated initial customer qualification.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Admin & Telemetry Portal
projects.description: Designed a secure and comprehensive administrative portal for management of leads, services, newsletter subscriptions, and visitor statistics. Features modern glassmorphism UI, real-time syncs, and multi-language dashboard controls.
projects.outcome: Unified client CRM, system telemetry, and marketing lists under a single pane of glass.

projects.title: Relational Data Schema & Event Pipeline
projects.description: Engineered a high-performance PostgreSQL/Supabase relational database architecture and SMTP dispatch flows. Configured secure connection boundaries, automatic audit logs, and instant notifications to centralize business leads.
projects.outcome: Synchronized global operations pipeline with zero lag and high security compliance.
